Total Credits

15

1. At least nine of the ﬁfteen semester hours must at the 3xx-level or higher (including at least six hours at the University of Maryland, College Park)

2. No more than six of the ﬁfteen semester hours may be taken at an institution other than the University of Maryland, College Park

3. No more than six of the ﬁfteen semester hours may count toward the

student's major and supporting courses

Rhetoric Minor (ENGL)

4. At least 3 semester hours must be taken in the English Department,

and at least 3 semester hours must be taken from the Department of Communication

5. No course used to satisfy a Fundamental Studies requirement may
